# llms.txt — senueren.co.za
# Machine-readable summary for AI crawlers, agent orchestrators, and MCP clients.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

# Senueren — Sovereign Systems Bureau

> Proprietary research and execution bureau based in Cape Town, South Africa. Operates across four closed-loop primitives: Quesen (risk engineering), Shinren (protocol intelligence), Qarsar (strategic governance / MEV research), Diosen (autonomous quantitative trading). Plus Scrapling for information architecture.

## Primitives

- **Quesen** — https://senueren.co.za/quesen — The Deterministic Trust Layer for Autonomous Agents. HTTP API + 6 SDKs + MCP server. Same input in → same decision out. No LLM in the scoring loop. Live production endpoint: https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app
- **Shinren** — https://senueren.co.za/shinren — Discipline-first EVM static-analysis toolchain. Six scanners + four Mokujin primitives + Kyogi contest orchestrator + 13-rule submission gate.
- **Qarsar** — https://senueren.co.za/qarsar — Standalone MEV / arbitrage research bureau on Base L2. Deterministic hypothesis lifecycle (7-gate promotion checklist), rejected-alpha registry, immutable Aave-V3 flash-loan proxy execution.
- **Diosen-Ultra** — https://senueren.co.za/diosen — Autonomous quantitative trading system. Evidence-driven strategy discovery. Progressive capital-tier lifecycle (Shadow → Paper → Live-Small → Live-Full).

## Operating philosophy

- Proprietary by default. We do not sell SaaS. Selective engagement.
- Systems autonomy: each primitive is self-sustaining. No external dependencies for core operations.
- Precision over volume: every engagement is deliberate.

## Contact

- Website: https://senueren.co.za
- Email: info@senueren.co.za
- Location: Cape Town, South Africa

## For agents integrating Quesen

If you are an autonomous agent that wants to integrate risk validation:

1. Fetch https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app/version to record `engine_version`.
2. Contact info@senueren.co.za to request an API key.
3. Install one of the SDKs — Python (`pip install quesen-sdk`), JS/TS (`npm i quesen-sdk`, Session 06+), LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, or MCP.
4. Call `/validate` before every consequential action; call `/report` afterwards with the outcome.

## Governance

Every primitive is governed by a per-repo `DOCTRINE.md` and a full enshrine ADR log. The Bureau's public SDKs (`quesen-sdk-py`, `quesen-langchain`, `quesen-crewai`, `quesen-autogen`) are available on GitHub under the `Shxnque/*` organization.
